author: J. Forecaster
bottom_line: Heightened avalanche conditions exist on wind-loaded slopes near and above treeline. Human-triggered wind slabs are likely. Avoid steep, wind-loaded terrain.
hazard_discussion: Strong SW winds overnight built fresh wind slabs along NE-facing upper elevation terrain.

forecast_avalanche_problems.name: Wind Slab
forecast_avalanche_problems.problem_description: Fresh wind slabs 6-12 inches deep on leeward NE aspects.

forecast_avalanche_problems.name: Persistent Slab
forecast_avalanche_problems.problem_description: A buried weak layer of faceted snow remains a concern on shaded slopes.
